TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Rukai, story: RukaiNr-frog_Tuku

S.FORM: ikay e vavalake yaie yakay kikay avava ini kay takurauru si.
S.TRANSL: 有個男孩有一隻青蛙的玩具。
A boy has a toy as the toy.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la ikay ki acilay yadringi ki didilrungu.
S.TRANSL: 有一杯裡面有水的罐子。
There is a jar with water inside.

S.FORM: la ka palra ini kayki taupungu kayki vavalake la e apece.
S.TRANSL: 小孩的同伴是一隻狗，然後他們睡著了。
The companion of the kid is a dog and (they) slept.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: sa ka maungu kikay vavalake si sa apece kikay vavalake yaie kai dreele kayki takuraru kay matuase ubere.
S.TRANSL: 在夜晚，當小孩睡著時，他沒有看著青蛙，它就跑走了。
At night, when the kid was sleeping, he didn’t see the frog and (it) ran away.

S.FORM: la pacunu kikay vavlake si e la sa kaulraw kuini ki takurauru kayki takurauru Mmm.
S.TRANSL: 當小孩醒來時，青蛙就不見了。
When the kid woke up, the frog disappeared.

S.FORM: ani kakadrua kudra takurauru la iya kay vavavalake kasamali.
S.TRANSL: 男孩說：「青蛙怎麼會不見了呢？」
“How come the frog is gone?” the kid said.

S.FORM: la e silasilape kikay vavalake adravane kikay taupungu la gugu kikay acilay kay didilrungu kay taikayane ki takuraru si.
S.TRANSL: 然後小孩開始找(它)。連狗狗都倒掉青蛙所在的罐子的水。
Then the kid searched for (it). The dog even poured out the water of the small jar of the frog.

S.FORM: yainu iyaiya si la kakadrua la silasilape piakuidra si la kai makakidringay.
S.TRANSL: 「在哪裡？」他說。（男孩）拼命尋找它但卻找不到。
“Where it is?” he said and (the boy) put much effort to search for it but cannot find it.

S.FORM: sa silasilape la katuase kikay taupungu nala yaie la pua ngikakurubungu kikay didilrungu kudra wasilasilape takuraru si.
S.TRANSL: 當(小孩)在尋找時，小狗離開並把頭塞到罐子裡找青蛙。
When (the kid) was searching for it, the dog left and put his head into the small jar to look for the frog.

S.FORM: la mua kay la ikay inua ini la iya si kebere kay ki taupungu kikay vavalake.
S.TRANSL: 「他在哪裡？」他就這樣想，然後抱著他的狗。
“Where it is?” the boy thought and hugged the dog.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: kasamalimali kuini ki takurauru.
S.TRANSL: (小孩)緊張青蛙。
(The kid) is nervous about the frog.

S.FORM: muainu muainu kudra takurauru la iyaiya kikay.
S.TRANSL: 「青蛙，去哪裡了？去哪裡了？」他說。
“Frog, where are you? Where are you?” (he) said.

S.FORM: la silasilape piakuidra yainu iyaiya si.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他)拼命找。「在哪裡呢？」他說。
Then (he) put effort to seach for it. “Where it is?” he said.

S.FORM: kaurivariva tadrusa kayki taupungu.
S.TRANSL: 這個小朋友在跟小狗講話。
The kid was talking to the dog.

S.FORM: la katuase silape si la si kela kayki e la e angatu dreele adarvane kayki angatu yakay kikay sigu.
S.TRANSL: 然後(他們)繼續找，來到一棵樹，看到樹上有蜜蜂。
Then (they) went searching, came to the tree, and see the tree have hornet.

S.FORM: la kasamali sa katuase ngipalay kikay taupungu si kikay vavalake.
S.TRANSL: 當(虎頭蜂)飛出來的時候，小孩和狗就嚇到。
When (the hornets) flew out, the kid and the dog were shocked.

S.FORM: sa kela kay yaie kikay sigu la kaynganay ngipalay mia kilrilangedre liniane.
S.TRANSL: 當虎頭蜂飛出來，他們好像被叮。
When the hornet flew out, they seem to be stung.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.自由斜格

S.FORM: la kilangedre kikay vavalake.
S.TRANSL: 然後小男孩被叮。
Then the kid was stung.

S.FORM: ala ikay kikay e tila tila tila tila ikay kay.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻老鼠在這裡。
There is a mouse here.

S.FORM: la mulebe kuini sigu si vunguvunguvungu.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂下來，並嗡嗡叫著。
The hornets went down and kept buzzing.

S.FORM: katuase ubere kay vavalake ubelenge ki angatu.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩跑走並爬上樹。
The kid ran away and went up to the tree.

S.FORM: adravane kay tila la muadringi ki barungulu la kaynganay ubelenge.
S.TRANSL: 連老鼠都從洞裡跑出來。
Even the mouse came out from the hole.

S.FORM: la sa e silape mua kay ki angatu la kakadrua kai kidringai kikay vavalake kuini ki takurauru kai makakidringai kadrua.
S.TRANSL: 當(小孩)去樹上，小孩找不到青蛙。青蛙不在那裡。
When (the kid) went to the tree, the kid cannot find the frog. The frog was not there.

S.FORM: la kela kay si la kikay la sigu nayaie la vunguvungu si langedre kayki taupungu.
S.TRANSL: 然後這些虎頭蜂咧，一直嗡嗡叫，然後叮那隻狗。
Then the hornets kept buzzing and stinging the dog.

S.FORM: la kaynganay kikay kuici la katuase muadreke kikay vavalake la v.
S.TRANSL: 然後貓頭鷹出來，小孩就跌倒了。
Then the owl came out and the kid fell over.

S.FORM: la tuvereverevere mua kay cakena la kaynganay ngibalay utaluvayvay kikay.
S.TRANSL: (小孩)掉到地上，貓頭鷹飛出來。
(The kid) fell down to the ground and the owl flew out.

S.FORM: kuici kuici amia ta ki lu.
S.TRANSL: kuici我們也稱他為lu。
“Kuici” is also called “lu” by us.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數(包含).附著主格

S.FORM: sa katuase vunguvungu kikay e sigu yaie katuase ubere kikay taupungu.
S.TRANSL: 當虎頭蜂一直嗡嗡叫，狗就逃走了。
When the hornets were buzzing, the dog ran away.

S.FORM: la apece ki vavalake kay muadreke tualay adringi ki barungulu kikay kuici.
S.TRANSL: 小孩從貓頭鷹的樹洞掉下來。
The kid fell over from the hole of the owl.

S.FORM: kudra silapeane ini ki e e takurauru.
S.TRANSL: 尋找青蛙。
His search for the frog.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: sa vunguvungu kikay sigu nala la muadreke kay vavalake si kaynganay utaluvayvay kikay kuici la katuase ubere kikay taupungu.
S.TRANSL: 當虎頭蜂嗡嗡叫，小孩跌倒，貓頭鷹出來，小狗逃走。
When the hornets kept buzzing, the kid fell down, the owl came out, and the dog ran away.

S.FORM: sa katuase ubere kikay taupungu na yaie la ngipalay kikay e kuici.
S.TRANSL: 當小狗逃走，貓頭鷹飛出來。
When the dog ran away, the owl flew out.

S.FORM: la dredredreele kikay vavalake pasualala.
S.TRANSL: 小孩看著蜜蜂往哪去。
The kid watched where (the hornets) went.
這是鹿角嗎？
Is this horn?

S.FORM: la ikay kikay lawngu kikay salawnguane ikay kay la mua ubelenge kikay vavalake.
S.TRANSL: 然後有鹿角，小男孩爬上去。
And there is the horn of the deer and the kid went up to it.

S.FORM: si kiraysi kay ki lawngu kay kuini.
S.TRANSL: 然後他抓住鹿角。
and (he) grasped the horn.

S.FORM: la ilebe kikay taupnguu nene kay cakena dredredreele.
S.TRANSL: 下面有小狗坐在地上看
The dog sat and watched in the lower part.

S.FORM: la ikay belenge kavay kuici.
S.TRANSL: 上面有貓頭鷹。
The owl is in the upper part.

S.FORM: kikay lalake si kialra ki e pubelenge taiane ki lawngu kikay vavalake la ilebe kay taupungu alealeale.
S.TRANSL: 小孩被放上角的地方，小狗在下面叫。
The kid is put up to the place of the horn and the dog is barking down there.

S.FORM: sa mia kuini nala katuase muadreke kikay vavalake sa kalrabuthu kikay salawnguane si.
S.TRANSL: 當鹿鬆開小孩，他就掉了下去。
When the deer released the kid, he fell down.

S.FORM: la muadreke kay taupungu mucakena mararamaw kikay tadrusa kikay umaumase si kay taupungu.
S.TRANSL: 小狗一樣掉到地面上。他們兩個，小孩和小狗。
The dog also fell down to the ground. Two of them, the kid and the dog.

S.FORM: kudra kialawngu ki salawnguane kikay vavalake.
S.TRANSL: 小孩被鹿勾住。
The kid was hung by the deer.

S.FORM: sa ngimia kuini nana mucilri muadringi acilay tuverevere kikay taupungu si kikay vavalake tarutadrusa alraalra kikay vavalake angeale kayki taupungu ini si.
S.TRANSL: 當他們兩個 (小孩和狗) 掉到水裡，狗被小孩扛在肩膀上。
When two of them, the kid and the dog, fell down to the water, the dog were carried on the shoulder by the kid.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: adreeleane kuini ki tamulre tamurenereane lini taiane muadringi mua ki acilay.
S.TRANSL: 我們看得出來他們掉下水的地方
We can see where they fell down to the water.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la ikay kay nene kikay vavalake kasamalimali.
S.TRANSL: 小孩很驚嚇並在這裡坐下來。
The kid was shocked and sat here.

S.FORM: la yadringi lrededepe ki acilay kikay vavalake.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在水裡游。
The kid was swimming in the water.

S.FORM: la katuase ubelenge kebere kayki e barungulu kikay vavalake.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬上去抱住洞。
The kid went up to hug the hole.

S.FORM: la ubelenge kay taupungu si alealeale.
S.TRANSL: 小狗上去一直叫。
The dog went up and kept barking.

S.FORM: wasilasilapeana kudra ki takurauru.
S.TRANSL: (他們)尋找青蛙。
(They) looked for the frog.

S.FORM: sa kaulay nga nala la katuase ubelenge kayki barungulu kayki ki angatu ala kidringay kayki takurauru.
S.TRANSL: 過了很久，(小孩)上去木頭上尋找青蛙。
For a long time, the kid went up to the wood to look for the frog.

S.FORM: kikay vavalake si kikay taupungu si ka ikay gurapangane kirararagay kidringayane lini si la iya kay.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和小狗趴在(木頭上)，開心地尋找(青蛙)。
The kid and the dog was lying (on the wood) and happily looking for (the frog).

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.附著屬格

S.FORM: paramia kuini kuini tawa tasilapeane lini tasakaurameane lini kayki takurauru kayki taupungu si kayki vavalake.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗尋找的是他們失去的青蛙。
The search for the frog is what the kid and the dog lack.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.附著屬格
第三人稱複數.附著屬格

S.FORM: la dreelea kay yakay ki e acilay kikay takurauru yaie kinbekele ikamemealeane madalame ikay ki aciacilay kudra tapanianianiakeane lini yaie.
S.TRANSL: 看!有青蛙。(青蛙)很少在陸地上，都是在水上生活。
Look! There are frogs. (Frogs) rarely live on the dry land but usually live in the water.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.附著屬格

S.FORM: bekeleane ku taikayane lini kameamealeane adravane mua kameamealeane takadaedaedapengeane.
S.TRANSL: 他們很少在陸地上，就算在陸地上，也是在潮濕的地方。
They rarely are on the land. Even though (they) go to the land, they are in the humid places.

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱複數.附著屬格

S.FORM: ka aciacilay wamua kikay e takurauru dreelea kay vavalake nala waecenge ki takuraru si kiraragay tadrusa kayki taupungu.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙去水那邊。看！小孩拿著青蛙，他們兩個和狗很開心。
The frog went to the water. Look! The kid held the frog and two of them and the dog were very happy.

S.FORM: la ibelenge kay.
S.TRANSL: 在下面
In the lower part
這個怎麼好像猴子捏。
How come this looks like a monkey.

S.FORM: takurauru.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙，這個也是青蛙。

S.FORM: la dreelea kay matuase ubelenge kayki angatu kikay la takurauru kay.
S.TRANSL: 看！青蛙爬上木頭。
Look! The frog went up to the wood.

S.FORM: itha drusa tulru supate lrima eneme pitu valru pangate pangate kay takurauru kay yabelenge kayki barungulu.
S.TRANSL: 一、二、三、四、五、六、七、八、九。有九隻青蛙在洞上。
one, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine. There are nine frogs on the hole.

S.FORM: ala dreela kay vavalake waecenge kayki takurauru si pubelenge kay alrima ini sa kirararagay ku takidringayane lini.
S.TRANSL: 看！小孩把青蛙放到他的頭上，對他們的找到青蛙這件事感到很開心。
Then look! The kid put the frog onto his head and is very happy about that they found the frog. (their finding the frog)

M.TRANSL: 第三人稱單數.附著屬格
第三人稱複數.附著屬格

S.TRANSL: 結束了。
The end.
